reference_goals: Block geometry — cross-drilled galleries, valve cartridge cavities, plug access
Port layout — P/T/A/B engraved ports, SAE O-ring boss, thread spec
Valve cartridge integration — cavity dimensions, seal grooves, adjustment cap
Mounting — bolt pattern, dowel pads, manifold stack face sealing
Service access — test/gauge port bosses, protective covers, label plates
needed_metadata: BOM — block material (6061/ductile iron), valve cartridge types, seal compounds
Assembly torque table — plugs, cartridges, stack bolts
needed_engineering_docs: Hydraulic circuit schematic — valve symbols, flow paths
FEA boundary — internal pressure loads, bolt clamping, thermal expansion
safety_boundary: Design reference only; no system-specific pressure settings or commissioning procedures.
